message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam interfaceBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam interfaceBorderColor black
skinparam interfaceFontColor black
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #ADD8E6
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor black
skinparam stereotypeCFontColor black
skinparam stereotypeIBackgroundColor #D8BFD8
skinparam stereotypeIBorderColor black
skinparam stereotypeIFontColor black
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #90EE90
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor black
skinparam stereotypeCFontColor black

class "Publisher" as Publisher {
    void subscribe(Subscriber<? super T> s)
}
class "Flowable" as Flowable {
    void subscribeActual(Subscriber<? super T> s)
}
class "FlowableFilter" as FlowableFilter
class "FlowableMap" as FlowableMap
class "Subscription" as Subscription {
    void request(long n)
    void cancel()
}
class "FilterSubscriber" as FilterSubscriber
class "MapSubscriber" as MapSubscriber

Publisher <|-- Flowable : implements
Flowable <|-- FlowableFilter : extends
Flowable <|-- FlowableMap : extends
FlowableFilter o-- FilterSubscriber : creates
FlowableMap o-- MapSubscriber : creates
FilterSubscriber ..|> Subscription : implements
MapSubscriber ..|> Subscription : implements

note right of Publisher
    T
end note
note right of Flowable
    T
end note
note right of FlowableFilter
    T
end note
note right of FlowableMap
    T, U
end note
note right of Subscription
    T
end note
note right of FilterSubscriber
    T
end note
note right of MapSubscriber
    T, U
end note

@enduml
